name: Uvavanyo lokuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni
description: Uvavanyo lommandla wokuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni kunye nobunzima bokugula kobushushu. Umbala womchamo ngowona mqondiso wentsimi osebenzayo. Vavanya ubume bengqondo njengesiphawuli sokuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni okumandundu okuqhubela phambili kwistrowuku sobushushu.
instructions: Jonga umbala womchamo, i-skin turgor, isimo sengqondo kunye neempawu ezibalulekileyo. Umchamo omnyama, i-mucous membranes eyomileyo, kunye ne-tachycardia ibonisa ukungabikho kwamanzi okudinga ukubuyisela okusebenzayo.

categories.label: Ifakwe kakuhle ngamanzi
categories.description: Umthubi ophaphileyo ukuya kumchamo ocacileyo. Akukho ngenelelo lufunekayo.

categories.label: Ukuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni okungephi
categories.description: Umchamo omnyama omthubi, unxaniwe. Ukubuyisela amanzi emlonyeni. Khuthaza i-250-500 ml yamanzi ngeyure.

categories.label: Ukuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni okuphakathi
categories.description: Umchamo we-amber, i-HR iphakanyisiwe, i-skin turgor iyancipha, umlomo owomileyo. Ulwelo lwe-IV/IO ukuba umlomo awunyamezeli. I-1-2L LR okanye i-NS.

categories.label: Ingozi -- Ubushushu beStrowuku / Simandundu
categories.description: Ukukhutshwa komchamo omncinci, i-LOC etshintshileyo, isikhumba esomileyo esishushu. Ungxamiseko lwezonyango -- ukupholisa ngokukhawuleza + ulwelo lwe-IV + MEDEVAC.

pediatric.note: Abantwana bakhupha amanzi ngokukhawuleza kunabantu abadala. I-Sunken fontanelle (iintsana), iinyembezi ezingekhoyo, kunye nokutyhafa ziimpawu ezibalulekileyo. Ubunzima obusekelwe kwi-IV: 20 mL / kg LR bolus.

obstetric.note: Abasetyhini abakhulelweyo badinga ulwelo olwandisiweyo. Ukuphelelwa ngamanzi emzimbeni kunokubangela ukushwabana kwangaphambi kwexesha. Ukubuyisela amanzi emzimbeni ngokuqatha kuqala; IV ukuba awunyamezeli ngomlomo.

source: PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine / US Army Hot Weather Ops
